title: Hornet Removal in Brooklyn Heights | $350–$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal in Brooklyn Heights, Brooklyn. Safe, effective hornet nest elimination for $350–$550. Serving historic brownstones and residential properties. Call today!
intro: Brooklyn Heights residents know that hornets can pose serious risks to families and pets, especially in the area's densely packed brownstones and tree-lined streets. Best Pest Control NYC offers professional hornet removal services throughout Brooklyn Heights, ensuring your historic home and outdoor spaces remain safe from aggressive stinging insects. Our expert technicians provide fast, effective hornet nest elimination with pricing ranging from $350 to $550.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Brooklyn Heights for years, understanding the unique challenges of pest control in historic neighborhoods with older architecture and mature tree canopies. Our licensed technicians use safe, proven methods that protect your family, pets, and the architectural integrity of your brownstone or townhouse.
localContext: Brooklyn Heights' beautiful tree-canopied streets along the Promenade and near Cadman Plaza Park create ideal nesting sites for hornets during warmer months. The neighborhood's mix of 19th-century brownstones, co-ops, and garden apartments requires specialized pest control approaches that respect both the historic character and the safety needs of one of Brooklyn's most established residential communities.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Brooklyn Heights?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day hornet removal services throughout Brooklyn Heights. Once you contact us, we'll schedule an appointment within 24 hours in most cases. Emergency situations involving nests near entryways or high-traffic areas receive priority response to ensure your safety.

faqs.question: What determines the cost of hornet removal in the $350–$550 range?
faqs.answer: Pricing depends on nest location, size, and accessibility. Ground-level nests or those in easily accessible areas typically cost $350–$425, while nests in high locations like upper-story eaves, chimneys, or tall trees may cost $450–$550. We provide upfront pricing after a brief assessment of your specific situation.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my brownstone and landscaping?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use targeted treatment methods specifically designed for Brooklyn Heights' historic properties. Our technicians are trained to protect your brownstone's exterior, ornamental ironwork, and mature landscaping while effectively eliminating hornet nests. We take extra care to preserve the architectural details that make your property special.

faqs.question: What's the difference between hornets, wasps, and yellow jackets?
faqs.answer: Hornets are larger than yellow jackets and most wasps, typically building large, enclosed paper nests in trees or under eaves. They're generally less aggressive than yellow jackets but more defensive of their nests. Our technicians will identify the species during inspection and use the most appropriate removal method for your specific infestation.
